notes: Static foundation knowledge taxonomy. Users can add content, but should keep these category ids stable once agents rely on them.

categories.purpose: Durable market regime, liquidity, trend, breadth, and structure principles.
Risk limits, drawdown handling, invalidation, and exposure control.
Reusable setup definitions and conditions for taking or avoiding trades.
Sizing rules, scale-in/out logic, and risk budget allocation.
Macro conditions, rate/liquidity context, and cross-asset priors.
Indicator definitions, limitations, and interpretation boundaries.
Agent behavior boundaries and decision permissions.
Order timing, execution constraints, slippage, and operational rules.
Post-trade learning, review, and self-iteration principles.
Durable research notes that do not fit a stricter rule category yet.

schema_fields.foundation_category: One stable category id from categories.
schema_fields.principle_type: principle | rule | playbook | checklist | definition | boundary
schema_fields.applies_to: List of instruments, agents, setups, or contexts this record applies to.
schema_fields.valid_when: List of conditions where this knowledge is valid.
schema_fields.invalid_when: List of conditions where this knowledge should not be applied.
schema_fields.rule_direction: allow | block | reduce | increase | observe | neutral
schema_fields.conflicts_with: Optional list of rule_id values that this record intentionally conflicts with.
